channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa Needs Faster and More Strategic Infrastructure Financing to Meet AI-Driven Power Demand
item.description: This opinion article by Lazarus Angbazo examines how the rise of artificial intelligence is changing the global power sector and why Africa must urgently rethink how it finances electricity infrastruc...

item.title: Explaining the ending of Netflix’s ‘The Boroughs’ and the fate of Mother
item.description: The Netflix series ‘The Boroughs’, created by Jeffrey Addiss and Will Matthews and executive produced by the Duffer Brothers, follows residents of a retirement community who become entangled in a dist...

item.title: University graduate reflects on lessons learned after ending relationship with wealthy older partner
item.description: A young South African woman, Siyamthanda Mabizela, has opened up about her experience dating a wealthy man who was about 10 years older than her while she was still a struggling university student. Sh...

item.title: One dead, 20 missing after building collapse in Pampanga; rescue operations ongoing
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Pampanga, Philippines, where a building collapse has left at least one person confirmed dead and around 20 others still missing as of the latest updates. According to rep...

item.title: Pretoria High Court orders Gauteng transport department to settle R154 million payment dispute with Putco
item.description: The Pretoria High Court has ordered the Gauteng Department of Roads and Transport to pay more than R154 million to bus operator Putco after a dispute over unpaid subsidised commuter transport services...

item.title: Suspect shot dead after firing at White House checkpoint; Trump unharmed during incident
item.description: A live blog report covers an armed incident near the White House in Washington, D.C., where a suspect approached a security checkpoint at 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue and opened fire on Secret ...

item.title: Gor Mahia crowned KPL champions as AFC Leopards drop points; prize money and CAF rewards explained
item.description: Gor Mahia have officially secured the Kenya Premier League title for a record-extending 22nd time after their closest rivals AFC Leopards failed to win their match against APS Bomet. This result left ...

item.title: Teen rape victim criticises court decision after boys avoid custodial sentences
item.description: A 16-year-old girl who was raped by two teenage boys has spoken publicly about her distress following a court decision not to impose custodial sentences on the offenders. In an interview with the BBC,...

item.title: Government orders Delhi Gymkhana Club to vacate land amid debate on public interest and elite privilege
item.description: The Union government has directed the Delhi Gymkhana Club to vacate its premises by June 5, 2026, ending its long-standing occupation of government-owned land in a high-security and strategically sens...

item.title: Azam FC Players Dominate Taifa Stars Squad as Nado and Kagoma Miss Friendly Match Call-Up
item.description: Shirikisho la Mpira wa Miguu Tanzania (TFF) limetangaza kikosi cha Taifa Stars kwa ajili ya mechi mbili za kirafiki za kimataifa zitakazochezwa mwezi ujao, huku majina ya wachezaji maarufu Iddi Selema...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif arrives in China for key meetings to boost CPEC Phase-II and bilateral cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has reached Beijing on Sunday after starting his four-day official visit to China. He landed in Hangzhou on Saturday and addressed the Pakistan-China Business-to-Business...

item.title: IAF test pilot school graduates 17 officers after advanced flight test training programme
item.description: The Indian Air Force has successfully graduated 17 officers, including 11 test pilots and 6 flight test engineers, from the 48th Flight Test Course conducted at the Air Force Test Pilots School (AFTPS...

item.title: VW Transporter and Ford Tourneo comparison highlights shared platform, features, and value differences
item.description: The Volkswagen Transporter has been reviewed in comparison with the Ford Tourneo, with both vehicles sharing a close engineering relationship through a global commercial vehicle alliance between Volks...

item.title: Billy Corgan says Smashing Pumpkins would like to perform their ‘Mellon Collie’ orchestral show at the Las Vegas Sphere
item.description: Billy Corgan has revealed that Smashing Pumpkins are interested in staging their orchestral ‘A Night of Mellon Collie and Infinite Sadness’ production at the Las Vegas Sphere. Speaking during an inter...

item.title: Ellie Goulding covers Justin Bieber’s ‘Daisies’ and debuts new song at BBC Radio 1 Big Weekend
item.description: Ellie Goulding performed at BBC Radio 1’s Big Weekend, held at Herrington Country Park in Sunderland, where she delivered a set that combined some of her best-known hits with new material and a surpri...

item.title: Mixx and Hisense launch FIFA World Cup 2026 promotional campaign to boost digital payments in Tanzania
item.description: A mobile financial services provider in Tanzania, Mixx, has partnered with global electronics company Hisense to launch a nationwide promotional campaign linked to the FIFA World Cup 2026™. The campai...

item.title: Fire in Parola, Binondo displaces around 2,000 families in Manila
item.description: A major fire broke out in Parola, Binondo in Manila, leaving around 2,000 families without homes. According to the report, the incident caused widespread displacement in the affected community, forcin...

item.title: Senate minority bloc pushes leadership change amid impeachment court proceedings
item.description: Senator Panfilo “Ping” Lacson has confirmed that efforts are underway within the Senate to replace the current leadership, following recent political developments tied to the chamber’s role as an impe...

item.title: Kenton Cool reaches 20th ascent of Mount Everest and confirms he will continue climbing
item.description: Veteran British mountaineer Kenton Cool has successfully reached the summit of Mount Everest for the 20th time, further extending his reputation as one of the most experienced non-Sherpa climbers on t...

item.title: Outgoing Governor General Mary Simon says criticism of her French skills was unfair and highlights Indigenous language loss
item.description: Outgoing Governor General Mary Simon has said that criticism of her French language abilities during her tenure was unfair, arguing that it is unreasonable to expect someone to learn a new language qu...
